tokens.name: LEGEND
tokens.tagline: Built for the ones who beg — the most polite reply guy on Solana.
tokens.description: LEGEND is the calm flex — a gentleman lizard in a space full of noise.
tokens.longDescription: LEGEND is the calm flex. A gentleman lizard in a space full of noise — no screaming, no begging, no 'next 100x' promises. Just a tux, a vibe, and a community that gets it: persistent (always in the replies), polite (never aggressive), and inevitable. It's a culture coin built on patience over hype, presence over noise. Moments of legend, with PumpFun creator fees helping support the construction of a school in Nigeria — turning attention into something that lasts off-chain too.

tokens.name: Percolator
tokens.description: Permissionless perpetual markets on Solana — trade perps for any token, on-chain.
tokens.longDescription: Percolator is a permissionless perpetual-markets protocol on Solana. It lets anyone launch and trade fully on-chain perpetual futures for any Solana token — transparently, without gatekeepers or listing committees. Positions, funding, and settlement live on-chain, so traders keep custody and verifiability end to end. The goal is a clean, terminal-grade perps experience that brings derivatives to the long tail of Solana assets rather than just the majors.
